message:
Add DemoCard component for live demo showcases

Features:
- Category-based theming (ai-tools, education, developer-tools)
- Mouse-tracking spotlight effect (same pattern as ProjectCard)
- Technology tags display
- Optional preview image support
- Featured variant with expanded content
- "Try It" CTA with external link icon
- Haptic feedback on touch

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
